title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-4, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama for chat, LLM, and embeddings inside LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-user support, model management, and RAG.

title: ollama-hack
summary: Experimental Emacs client for Ollama: chat, generate, and manage models from within Emacs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple idiomatic interface to generate and chat with local models.

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI frontend for Ollama written in Node; chat, manage models, and pipe outputs.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot autocomplete engine via a simple proxy server.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; async, streaming, and embedding support with minimal deps.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Early demo showing how to expose Python functions as tools that Ollama models can call.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri-based desktop GUI for Ollama; cross-platform binary with tray icon.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# / .NET SDK for Ollama; supports .NET 6+ with async streaming and embedding APIs.

title: ollama-model-registry
summary: Community effort to catalog and document all compatible models and custom Modfiles on GitHub.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Simple Discord.py bot that routes user prompts to a local Ollama instance with slash commands.

title: ollama-chat-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit chat app that talks to Ollama; supports session memory and model switching.
